PluginData.Author: lolifamily
PluginData.Tooltip: Full HDR pipeline: fp16 scRGB swapchain, BT.2390 tonemapping, R16 lighting buffer, emissive boost
PluginData.Description: Replaces SE's SDR tonemapping pipeline with a true HDR path. Swapchain is upgraded to flip model R16G16B16A16_Float with scRGB color space. Lighting buffer, bloom chain, and custom textures (LCDs, text panels) are upgraded from R11G11B10 / R8G8B8A8 to R16G16B16A16 for full-precision HDR accumulation. BT.2390-based tonemapping preserves highlight detail beyond SDR white, with configurable peak / paper-white / source peak / black lift. Emissive billboards (thrusters, lasers, muzzle flashes) and GPU particles (exhaust, sparks) are boosted by a configurable factor; diffuse content is untouched. UI is composited at user-set paper-white brightness. Screenshots are captured as OpenEXR (HDR) and tonemapped PNG (SDR) in parallel. Optional G-Sync/FreeSync tearing support and low-latency mode (1-frame GPU queue). Auto-disables itself if it crashes during init, with a flag in the config to re-enable. Requires Windows HDR enabled and a supported display; can be force-enabled on SDR displays.
